name: Seker Finansal Kiralama A.S.
summary: Seker Finansal Kiralama A.S. provides financial leasing services. It offers leasing services for production machinery, work machine and forklift, logistics transport equipment, commercial/passenger vehicle, agricultural equipment, medical devices, yacht and boat, and energy and technology, as well as workplaces, offices, factory building, and land leasing services. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Seker Finansal Kiralama A.S. is a subsidiary of Sekerbank T.A.S.
